title: Cronos Group Q4 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Cronos delivered strong 2024 results with 35% year-over-year revenue growth to $117.6 million. The company nearly doubled adjusted gross margins and improved operating cash flow by $61.7 million to positive $18.8 million. In Q4 specifically, consolidated net revenue reached $30.3 million (27% YoY growth), with a 36% gross margin. The company maintains a robust balance sheet with $859 million in cash and equivalents. Spinach solidified its position as Canada's number-one cannabis brand by market share, with dominant rankings in edibles and flower categories. The SOURZ product line captured 23% of the gummy market in Q4. PEACE NATURALS achieved the number-one flower brand position in Israel with 24% market share despite competitive pressures. The brand is gaining traction in Germany and the UK markets. GrowCo expansion is progressing as planned, with Health Canada approval received in Q4. Construction completion is expected in Q2 2025, with first harvests anticipated in the second half of 2025. Operating expenses declined $5 million year-over-year, and management expects operating expenses to remain flat in 2025 despite GrowCo consolidation.
